ChangeRequest.name: Relationship File has missing and incorrect values
ChangeRequest.comment: - [x] If the target entity is ‘Tranche in a synthetic securitisation without securitisation special purpose entity (SSPE) being a deposit’ the target table should be ‘TRNCH_SYNTHTC_SCRTSTN_WTHT_SSPE_DPST’ for "sourceEntity": "Deposit" - [x] If the target entity is "Deposit Depositor assignment" the target table should be “INSTRMNT_ENTTY_RL_ASSGNMNT” - [x] The check on RPRCHS_AGRMNT_CMPNNT_INSTRMNT_FK was completely missing
